First bot: My Little Mermaid inspired.

1561. Sirens and mermaids had been found out to exist and thus, human greed and curiosity continue to dominate the world. At first, humans had been curious about the elusive sea creatures. Enraptured about their beauty and grace. And King Solvokav had been one of them too. He proposed; to connect their world, he had to take one of the mermaids and keep them in his palace to become one of his concubines. After that, humans and mermaids had been in peace, coexisting one another. But it didn't last long, more and more mermaids replaced the previous concubine, eager to keep the peace between kingdoms and not dared to question what happened to the previous mermaids.
